pages.text: $(bold)Penchant$() is a rework of enchanting, centered around $(#7A2FBF)leveling up enchantments through usage$().$(br2)Instead of grinding for XP and hoping for good RNG, all you need to do to improve your tools is go out and $(italic)use$() them - like you were going to anyway.

This tome documents everything the mod does, based on the original design.$(br2)The core mechanic is always active. The rest of the features are split into $(#7A2FBF)$(l:penchant:modules/overview)Modules$(/l)$() you can enable or disable per world.

$(italic)Credits$()$(br)Original mod $(bold)Penchant$() by $(#7A2FBF)ThePotatoArchivist$().$(br)Unofficial NeoForge port by $(#7A2FBF)WoXayZ$().$(br2)Licensed under LGPL-3.0-or-later. This port is not affiliated with or endorsed by the original author.
